creator: bjorn@neersighted.com
text: I do think this is the better route to go -- upstream is moving to asciidoctor as their build tool, instead of asciidoc3, and asciidoc3 installs as a2x3, instead of a2x. As such we would still have to patch git (or have the asciidoctor port install a symlink). If we go this route, once the upstream patch is merged in the next version, no patches/FreeBSD-specific behavior is needed.
